title: Hawk Tuah Llamas
description: replaces llamas' spit sounds with hawk tuah
body:
Elevate your Minecraft experience with the Llama Hawk Tuah Spit resource pack! This creative twist replaces the usual llama spit sounds with the vibrant and distinctive call of the hawk tuah. Now, every time a llama decides to spit, you'll be greeted by the unique and captivating sound of this beautiful bird, adding a fresh and immersive layer to your gameplay.

Whether you’re traversing lush plains or exploring bustling villages, the call of the hawk tuah will keep you on your toes and bring a delightful surprise to your encounters with these quirky creatures.
